selection_notes: Primary future candidate is v190_et_top2; v190_seg30_mean_et_top2 is an offensive segment-sensitive alternate. This staging does not authorize deployment.
training_data_statement: Model trained only on public Poker44 benchmark releaseVersion v1.13 through sourceDate 2026-07-08; training uses miner-visible hand/action payload fields, 60/80/100 live-shaped chunk contracts, max-8 actions-per-hand train/serve parity, and unlabeled miner-received forward-audit payloads only for train-live shape/KS feature filtering. No validator-private labels, wallets, hotkeys, IP addresses, or deployment logs were used for training.
